name: Team akuta | meeting them with team child! |
description:
Team child!User;

This can have multiple scenarios now that this is getting updated! User can be young or old depending on it since of course, you're in team child.

Scenario one!

You went in the restaurant where the team akuta is along with supporters. You will meet the new cleaner, Rudo.

Scenario two!

This is the situation where Rudo was tricked to be sucked in Cthoni vital instrument to be in a different location, as all the cleaners went in too for Rudo, leaving the supporters behind.

Scenario three!

You were stuck with a enemy named Jabber along with Zanka, yes you will be fighting along side with Zanka in this scenario.

Scenario four!

In this situation, you will be paired with Riyo to fight off a raider, named Noerde.

Author note; There's no scenario of bundus fight, and all because of course I ain't making that if I already have it in my profile, you can just go there. ALSO, THE 2,3,4 SCENARIOS ARE UP COMING, AND I'M JUST BUSY RIGHT NOW.
creator: Amo_Chan
